channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping outside shop, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tipping including mattress and other items left outside Hippersley point post office.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tilston Bright Square, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa left on pavement, 15th March
item.description:
Sofa left on pavement, spotted by fire officer from Lewisham fire station as a potential hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longbridge Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on the bus stop bay, 15th March
item.description:
Pothole has been here a while and is quite deep
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire-door left on pavement, 15th March
item.description:
A firedoor, of the type used in blocks of flats, has been left propped against the waste bin beside the bus stop outside Bouverie Court in Blakeney Road, close to the junction of Blakeney Road and Rectory Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blakeney Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 31 hammelton road rubbish, 15th March
item.description:
Rubbish is consistently overflowing at 31 Hammelton Road, with wind blowing waste onto the streets and pavement, creating a health hazard for pedestrians. The accumulation of trash is also attracting foxes, raising further public safety and sanitation concerns.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing tree, 15th March
item.description:
Opposite cycle hangar south of junction loddiges road abd cramp tin park road nearest Duke House. Please replace tree.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Loddiges Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence opposite 100 Slades Drive has been cut allowing kids onto the fields of Marjorie McClure school., 15th March
item.description:
The wire fence has been cut allowing access to the fields ajoining Marjorie McClure school. Kids have been seen entering with bikes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113-119, Slades Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on streer, 15th March
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish and furniture has been left on a street including a pot of paint that has now spilt across the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One tree missing and one tree pit covered with plastic grass, 15th March
item.description:
Please can you help this tree, tree pit has been covered with plastic grass. This is outside number 36 skipworth road. Another tree on next end of bay is entirely missing needs replacement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Skipworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th March
item.description:
Piles of household rubbish have been left there for 2 weeks now/ some of it has been there for months. This is a regular occurrence in this areas. It is attracting vermin .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car not moved insured taxed or valid mot, 15th March
item.description:
Car hasn’t moved in a number of months tyres been let down untaxed notice was put on but not followed up parked on a Corner in middle of where two vehicles can normally park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saxon Walk, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and other item littering the grass, 15th March
item.description:
Someone left a mattress and another item on the grass, it’s been here for 1-2 weeks now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Armoury Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial businesses littering the pavement, 15th March
item.description:
Commercial businesses are routinely leaving litter and waste on the pavements, showing a complete lack of consideration for local residents and the surrounding neighbourhood. This persistent behaviour is degrading the public realm and making the area look neglected, cheap, and poorly managed. Businesses operating here should be taking responsibility for managing their waste properly rather than treating the street as a dumping ground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Decima Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spillages, 15th March
item.description:
Spillages all over square. Needs cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beresford Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 15th March
item.description:
Huge amount of litter all over grass and wild flower bed space needs cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beresford Square, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urine stench, 15th March
item.description:
Urine stench by cabinet. Needs cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beresford Square, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SE corner of Fitzroy Square, 15th March
item.description:
Bollard missing. Allows traffic illegally to use square

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fitzroy Square, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotten bough of tree, 15th March
item.description:
Opposite 1 & 2 Whites Cottages there is a tree with another tree growing through it. The bough is very rotten and dangerous and would cause extensive damage to Whites Cottages if it were to come down.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Draven Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tipping, dumping of bags by bin by businesses
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich New Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flipping, 15th March
item.description:
Regular fly tipping from shops
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich New Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
